buggy_code_snippet: class UserService { String displayName(User user) { return user.getProfile().getName(); } }
fixed_code_snippet: class UserService { String displayName(User user) { if (user == null || user.getProfile() == null) { return ""; } return user.getProfile().getName(); } }
explanation: Add explicit null guard before chained dereference to prevent runtime NPE.
risk_note: Returning empty string may mask data-quality issues.

buggy_code_snippet: String sql = "select * from users where id=" + userId; return stmt.executeQuery(sql);
fixed_code_snippet: PreparedStatement ps = conn.prepareStatement("select * from users where id=?"); ps.setString(1, userId); return ps.executeQuery();
explanation: Replace string-concatenated SQL with parameterized query to prevent injection.

fixed_code_snippet: Map<Long, User> usersById = repo.findAllById(ids).stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(User::getId, u -> u)); for (Long id : ids) { users.add(usersById.get(id)); }
explanation: Collapse per-item lookup into one batch query to reduce round-trips.
risk_note: Batch fetch can increase transient memory for large lists.

buggy_code_snippet: InputStream in = new FileInputStream(path); return in.read();
fixed_code_snippet: try (InputStream in = new FileInputStream(path)) { return in.read(); }
explanation: Wrap stream in try-with-resources to guarantee close on success/failure.
risk_note: Changes ownership semantics; caller can no longer reuse stream reference.
